_doc: Fixture saneado: qa con provider openai-codex via CLI SSE — el frame final emitió event=error con error.type=insufficient_quota. El parser debe clasificar quota_exhausted respetando KNOWN_QUOTA_ERROR_TYPES_BY_PROVIDER['openai-codex'].
raw:
data: {"event":"chunk","data":{"delta":"texto saneado del modelo"}}
data: {"event":"error","data":{"error":{"type":"insufficient_quota","message":"You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details.","code":"insufficient_quota"}}}
